examination_log.method: Community-upgrade port: replaced WPL-era unusable Malayalam variant with stronger community fine-tune
examination_log.rationale: Previous Malayalam Lingua was ported from WPL/vrclc/Whisper-small-Malayalam, audited at 73.2% WER — unusable for production. Replaced with BettySara/whisper-large-v3-malayalam-merged, selected as the most-downloaded community Malayalam Whisper fine-tune on HF. Full WER audit pending; community signal supports usability.

quality_rating.note: Replaced unusable WPL fallback with community whisper-large-v3 Malayalam fine-tune. Quality verification pending.
